description_long: This is a life-sized, realistic chicken with a reddish-brown plumage and a prominent pink single comb atop its head. The feathers are dense and layered, with subtle variations in color from light tan to deeper brown, especially around the wings and tail. Its beak is short and yellowish, and the wattles beneath the beak are visible and pink. The chicken stands upright on two scaly, yellow legs with three forward-facing toes and one rear toe on each foot. The tail feathers are slightly fanned and pointed, and the wings are tucked close to the body. The overall appearance is healthy and robust, typical of a common urban or farmyard hen.
description: A realistic reddish-brown chicken with a pink comb, yellow beak, and scaly yellow legs, standing upright with layered feathers and a fanned tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chicken's face, pink comb, beak, wattles, and both legs clearly.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the full body, wing, tail feathers, and the chicken's head in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail feathers, back, and both legs from behind.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, but from the opposite side, showing the right wing and tail.
